entries.name: ElevenLabs
entries.blurb: The voices are worth it. The credit math isn't always.

entries.name: Fathom
entries.blurb: The cleanest meeting summary I got came from the free one.

entries.name: Granola
entries.blurb: Six rough bullets in, a summary sharper than my own notes out.

entries.name: n8n
entries.blurb: It runs our whole content pipeline — once you survive the learning curve.

entries.name: Fireflies.ai
entries.blurb: Brilliant for the whole team. Overkill for just you.

entries.name: Fliki
entries.blurb: The visuals are stock-basic. The voice is the reason you'd actually use it.

entries.name: Zapier
entries.blurb: 9,000 apps and the gentlest start — then the per-task bill arrives.

entries.name: InVideo AI
entries.blurb: It builds a whole video from one sentence. Then it tells you what that cost.

entries.name: Make
entries.blurb: Zapier's power at n8n's price — until the operations meter catches you.

entries.name: Pictory
entries.blurb: It turned my blog post into a video in two minutes. The clean download cost extra.

entries.name: Cartesia
entries.blurb: Sub-100ms voice that developers love and creators outgrow fast.

entries.name: Descript
entries.blurb: The transcript editing feels like magic. The AI-credit bill breaks the spell.

entries.name: Murf AI
entries.blurb: The studio is the reason to buy Murf. The voice isn't.

entries.name: Otter.ai
entries.blurb: The AI notes nailed it. The stingy free plan and a privacy suit didn't.

entries.name: Adobe Firefly
entries.blurb: Adobe's commercially-safe generative AI — best-in-class text-in-image and brand-safe licensing.

entries.name: Beautiful.ai
entries.blurb: Smart templates that auto-format as you add content — consistently polished slides.

entries.name: Bolt
entries.blurb: In-browser full-stack builder with framework flexibility and one-click deploy.

entries.name: Canva
entries.blurb: Presentations inside Canva — AI generation plus the full design toolkit and brand kit.

entries.name: Canva
entries.blurb: Design-for-everyone — 230M+ users, with Magic Studio AI baked into templates, images, and copy.

entries.name: CapCut AI
entries.blurb: The dominant short-form editor — AI captions, scripts, and effects on top of a full timeline.

entries.name: Captions
entries.blurb: AI video studio for talking-head social clips — auto-captions, eye contact, and AI presenters.

entries.name: ChatGPT
entries.blurb: The default AI assistant — ~900M weekly users and the strongest all-rounder for writing, reasoning, and everyday questions.

entries.name: Claude
entries.blurb: The best AI for writing — natural, on-brand copy for ads, emails, landing pages, and long-form.

entries.name: Claude
entries.blurb: Anthropic's assistant — the favorite for long-form writing, nuanced reasoning, and working with code.

entries.name: Claude Code
entries.blurb: Anthropic's agentic coding tool — understands your whole codebase, from the terminal or your IDE.

entries.name: Codex
entries.blurb: OpenAI's coding agent — works in your terminal, IDE, or the cloud, and ships whole tasks end-to-end.

entries.name: Copy.ai
entries.blurb: Go-to-market copy engine — sales emails, ad variations, and outbound at volume.

entries.name: Cursor
entries.blurb: AI-native code editor that writes, refactors, and debugs alongside you — built on VS Code.

entries.name: Gamma
entries.blurb: Type a topic, get a designed deck — slides, docs, and sites generated and restyled in seconds.

entries.name: Google AI Mode
entries.blurb: Google Search's conversational mode — AI answers grounded in the full live web index.

entries.name: Google Gemini
entries.blurb: Google's assistant — deep Workspace integration, a huge context window, and the strongest free tier.

entries.name: Google Veo 3
entries.blurb: Google's flagship video model — native audio, strong prompt adherence, and clean cinematic motion.

entries.name: GPT Image 2 (ChatGPT)
entries.blurb: OpenAI's image model in ChatGPT — the blind-vote quality leader, especially for text-in-image and prompt accuracy.

entries.name: Grammarly
entries.blurb: The writing-improvement standard — real-time grammar, clarity, and tone as you type, everywhere.

entries.name: HeyGen
entries.blurb: Expressive AI avatars and instant video translation — the fastest-growing pick for social and outreach.

entries.name: Higgsfield
entries.blurb: Cinematic short-form video with real camera control — dolly, orbit, and crash-zoom moves built for Reels and TikTok.

entries.name: Jasper
entries.blurb: Marketing-copy platform with brand voice, campaign workflows, and bulk generation.

entries.name: Kling AI
entries.blurb: Chinese video model leading on raw output quality — fluid motion, strong physics, cinematic shots.

entries.name: Lovable
entries.blurb: Describe an app, get a working full-stack product — the smoothest prompt-to-SaaS builder.

entries.name: Midjourney
entries.blurb: The artist's favorite — unmatched style range and aesthetic control for stylized, painterly output.

entries.name: Nano Banana (Gemini)
entries.blurb: Google's image model in Gemini — fast, photoreal edits that drove 200M images in its first week.

entries.name: NotebookLM
entries.blurb: Upload your sources and interrogate them — grounded answers plus podcast-style audio overviews. Free.

entries.name: Notion AI
entries.blurb: AI across your whole workspace — Q&A over your notes, docs, and databases in one place.

entries.name: Perplexity
entries.blurb: AI search that cites its sources — answers questions with linked references instead of SEO noise.

entries.name: QuillBot
entries.blurb: Paraphrasing, grammar, and summarizing in one — reword and tighten any draft fast.

entries.name: Replit
entries.blurb: Browser IDE with an AI agent — idea to deployed app, with hosting and a database built in.

entries.name: Sora
entries.blurb: OpenAI's video model and social app — fast ideation and strong short concept clips.

entries.name: Suno
entries.blurb: Type a prompt, get a full song — vocals, lyrics, and instruments in seconds.

entries.name: Synthesia
entries.blurb: Studio-grade AI avatars for training and explainer video — 240+ presenters across 160+ languages.

entries.name: Udio
entries.blurb: High-fidelity AI music generation with fine control over structure and audio quality.
